Uses of TransactionEntry in org.siprop.v2.stack.sip.transaction
 

Methods in org.siprop.v2.stack.sip.transaction that return TransactionEntry
 TransactionEntry TransactionController.searchCancelTransaction(gov.nist.javax.sip.message.SIPRequest cancel)
          Search a transaction that will be canceled by the CANCEL message If the transaction isn't exist return null.
 TransactionEntry TransactionController.searchTransaction(Context context)
          Search a transaction related SIP message.
 

Methods in org.siprop.v2.stack.sip.transaction that return types with arguments of type TransactionEntry
 java.util.List<TransactionEntry> TransactionController.getTransacitonList()
          get the list of transactions related this transaction set.
 

Uses of TransactionEntry in org.siprop.v2.stack.sip.transaction.impl
 

Classes in org.siprop.v2.stack.sip.transaction.impl that implement TransactionEntry
 class InviteClientTransaction
          The state machine for INVITE Client Transaction
According to RFC3261 Figure 5: INVITE client transaction
 class InviteServerTransaction
          The state machine for INVITE Server Transaction
According to RFC3261 Figure 7: INVITE server transaction
 class NonInviteClientTransaction
          The state machine for Non-INVITE Client Transaction
According to RFC3261 Figure 6: non-INVITE client transaction
 class NonInviteServerTransaction
          The state machine for Non-INVITE Server Transaction
According to RFC3261 Firgure 8: non-INVITE server transaction
